name: Zonte Metals Inc.
summary: Zonte Metals Inc., a junior exploration company, focuses on acquiring and exploring gold and copper deposits in Canada. The company holds a 100% interest in the Wings Point project that consists of four mineral exploration licenses covering 144 contiguous claims covering an area of 36 sq km located in the Province of Newfoundland and Labrador. It also holds an option agreement to acquire a 100% interest in the McConnells Jest project, which consists of 172 contiguous quartz claims covering an area of approximately 3,371 hectares located in the Yukon Territory; and the Cross Hills project that comprises 509 claims covering an area of 12,725 hectares located in the island portion of Newfoundland and Labrador. The company was formerly known as Empire Capital Corp. and changed its name to Zonte Metals Inc. in July 2011. Zonte Metals Inc. was founded in 2009 and is headquartered in Halifax, Canada.
